rationale: BSON spec requires UUID subtypes 0x03 and 0x04 to have exactly 16-byte data; driver lacked this validation.
Ticket re-purposed to create regression tests for tailable cursor iteration; test authoring, not a driver bug fix.
Build system fix: ensuring SASL constants are defined in config.m4; no spec behavior involved.
Array index gaps during JSON-to-BSON-to-PHP conversion; implementation bug in libbson, no specific spec rule cited.
Spec requires _id in upsertedIds to support any non-array BSON type; driver only handled ObjectID and integers.
PHP-specific bug: BSON class assigns public properties after var_dump(); internal PHP object behavior, no spec rule.
Crash fix: APM callbacks called when subscriber HashTable is uninitialized; internal implementation bug, not a spec rule violation.
Namespace placement of APM functions in PHP; internal API organization issue, spec does not dictate PHP namespace structure.
PHP 5 HashTable API misuse (missing null byte in key length); internal implementation bug, no spec behavior involved.
Insufficient detail; empty description; missing arg info in PHP function signature.
Improvement adding new API for Extended JSON spec 2.0 canonical/relaxed forms; new feature addition, not a nonconformance bug.
Server selection spec requires maxStalenessSeconds range validation; driver only checked 32-bit integers, missing 64-bit values.
Improvement to throw on unexpected URI option types instead of silently ignoring; ergonomics improvement, no specific spec rule violated.
Build fix: HAVE_SOCKLEN_T macro redefinition on Windows; no spec behavior involved.
Improvement to error messages during BSON encoding; no spec rule violated, just better diagnostics.
PHP 7.2 compatibility fix for array-to-object conversion; platform compatibility, not a spec deviation.
PHP 7.2 assert failure when modifying Persistable::bsonSerialize() return value; internal memory management bug, not a spec rule.
Feature addition: support exhaust query option; thin description, and adding a new feature rather than fixing a conformance bug.

Performance improvement: caching SCRAM-SHA-1 ClientKey; no spec rule violated, purely a performance optimization.
Behavior change from exception to log warning for deprecated BSON types; usability decision, not a spec rule contradiction.

Segfault when username not provided for SCRAM-SHA-1; crash/memory safety bug, no specific spec rule dictates segfault-free behavior.
Improvement to default TCP keepalive to true; default value change, no spec rule specifying keepalive defaults.

Memory leak: cursor struct leaked on error in phongo_execute_query(); resource management bug, no specific spec rule.
Improvement to add microseconds to debug log timestamps; diagnostic enhancement, no spec rule about log timestamp precision.
Memory leak: BSON reply not freed on error in phongo_execute_command(); resource management bug, no spec rule.
Improvement to report actual class name in exception messages; error message quality, no spec rule involved.
Internal refactor: option parsing for execute methods and server selection before execute; no behavior change per spec.
Command monitoring spec requires 'documents' key in commandStarted event for insert; driver omitted it. Related to SPEC-930.
Build warnings with Clang/LLVM due to pointer-bool conversion in ObjectId.c; compiler warning fix, no spec behavior.
Spurious getMore triggered when advancing new command cursor; implementation bug in cursor initialization, no named spec rule violated.
Infinite loop when iterating BSON object with foreach in PHP; PHP iteration handler bug, internal implementation issue.
macOS Sierra symbol not found (_clock_gettime); platform compatibility/linker issue, no spec behavior.
Segfault when encoding specific BSON document with ObjectID and Regex fields; crash/memory safety bug in libmongoc, not a spec rule.
Bound checking fix for duration_micros on 32-bit platforms in APM; platform-specific arithmetic bug, not a spec rule.

Coveralls reporting unknown coverage after repo move; CI tooling issue, no spec behavior.

Segfault in PHP shutdown handler during cursor/topology teardown; crash/memory safety bug, no spec rule.
Segfault during shutdown due to SASL cleanup interaction with smbclient.so; system-level crash, no spec behavior.

Removal of old Mongo Orchestration cluster tests; test cleanup/maintenance, no spec behavior change.
